<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "GLONET forecast validation"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis

from helpers.live_validation_report import ForecastValidationMetadata, render_forecast_validation_page

print(
    render_forecast_validation_page(
        "reports/glonet.latest.global.report.ipynb",
        ForecastValidationMetadata(
            system_label="GLONET",
            forecast_init="2026-05-13",
            validated_lead_days="1-10 days",
            observation_cutoff="2026-05-23",
            status="Complete",
        ),
    )
)
```
